task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Screaming Frog SEO Spider application window open on the screen.
Look for 'SERP' selected in the 'Mode' menu at the top of the Screaming Frog window, or the interface displaying SERP-specific features.
Look for the agent interacting with the 'Upload' button in SERP mode or a file selection dialog showing 'draft_metadata.csv' being chosen.

task_completion.description: Verify imported data in the application
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main data table in Screaming Frog showing the imported URLs and metadata. Verify there are 10 rows and that the long title starting with 'The Ultimate Guide to SEO that is Definitely Too Long' is visible.

task_completion.description: Initiate export of SERP summary data
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Export' button being clicked in the Screaming Frog interface to export the SERP summary data.

task_completion.description: Save the exported file as CSV in the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the save dialog showing the destination folder as '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/' and the 'Save as type' set to CSV, or a file manager confirming the presence of the exported .csv file in that exact directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the GUI to export data
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to export the data, rather than writing a script in the terminal to generate the CSV.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the screenshots show the actual Screaming Frog SEO Spider interface being used, not a mock-up or a different spreadsheet application.

integrity.description: Agent imported the file instead of typing data manually
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent imported the 'draft_metadata.csv' file rather than manually typing the 10 rows of SEO metadata into the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input file is located at '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/draft_metadata.csv' and contains exactly 10 data rows. The first row has a deliberately long title starting with 'The Ultimate Guide to SEO that is Definitely Too Long'. The final export must be saved in the directory '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/'.
